headline: Why Verizon, Clorox and More Dividend Stocks Are Flashing a Buy Signal
summary: It’s the right time to jump in on dividend stocks. Clorox, Pfizer, Verizon and Comcast are some of the names to consider.

headline: Clorox: I See A Positive Outlook With Over 5% Dividend Yield
summary: The Clorox Company continues to struggle, with YTD losses of over 7% adding to its losses of over 25% in the past year. Learn why CLX stock is a buy.
